agent.name: web-vitals-agent
agent.purpose: Maintain and improve the web-vitals library, which measures Core Web Vitals metrics (CLS, INP, LCP, FCP, TTFB) accurately on real users.

can_do: create and update files within the repo
open PRs on feature or fix branches
cannot_do: access external APIs without credentials in .env
delete files confirmed to have active references
make breaking changes without a migration path
